entry.value: Class: Rule Id/Name: Workflow Trigger Rule Action: run in Debug Object Browser by User spadmin

<?xml version='1.0' encoding='UTF-8'?> <!DOCTYPE WorkflowLaunch PUBLIC "sailpoint.dtd" "sailpoint.dtd"> <WorkflowLaunch status="failed" workflowName="HR Source Joiner event" workflowRef="HR Source Joiner event"> <Messages> <Message key="Account created but failed to modify : Failed to update attributes for identity CN=Shiva Nattali,OU=People,OU=Demo,DC=Eshiam,DC=com. A constraint violation occurred.
" type="Warn"/> <Message key="Account created but some attributes are not updated properly." type="Error"/> </Messages> <TaskResultRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.TaskResult" id="HR Source Joiner event - 16" name="HR Source Joiner event - 16"/> </TaskResultRef> <WorkflowCaseRef> <Reference class="sailpoint.object.WorkflowCase" id="c0a81d89900f1910819010eef55b01db" name="HR Source Joiner event - 16"/> </WorkflowCaseRef> </WorkflowLaunch>
